emptyCoaching.heading: No upcoming coaching sessions
emptyCoaching.description: Book a live coaching session to get personalized feedback.

firstSteps.title: First steps
firstSteps.description: Complete the basics to start sharing videos and working with your coaching group.
firstSteps.groupCreatedDescription: Your first group is ready for students and videos.
firstSteps.createGroupDescription: Create a group for the students or athletes you coach.
firstSteps.inviteStudentsReady: Share an invitation link so students can join and submit videos.
firstSteps.inviteStudentsBlocked: Create a group first, then share an invitation link.
firstSteps.groupJoinedDescription: You can upload videos and book coaching within your group.
firstSteps.joinGroupDescription: Use an invitation link from your coach to join a group.
firstSteps.videoUploadedDescription: Your latest videos will appear on this page.
firstSteps.uploadFirstVideoDescription: Share a training video so an expert can review it.
firstSteps.coachingBookedDescription: Your upcoming sessions will appear on this page.
firstSteps.bookLiveCoachingDescription: Reserve a live coaching slot when your expert has availability.
firstSteps.setAvailabilityDescription: Create session types and availability so students can book time with you.
firstSteps.reviewVideosDescription: Student videos waiting for feedback will appear here when they are submitted.

home.title: Coach videos, groups, and live sessions from one focused place.
home.summary: Review submitted videos, prepare upcoming sessions, and keep group activity moving without losing the thread.

empty.title: No urgent messages
empty.description: Conversation and review alerts will land here once live data is connected.

error.title: Review data is unavailable
error.description: If a product endpoint fails later, this compact state keeps the page useful without exposing technical details.

nextWork.title: Next work
nextWork.summary: A compact queue for reviews, sessions, and group actions.

upload.title: New student video
upload.summary: Capture the context experts need before a review begins.

videos.title: Videos
videos.noVideosHere: There are no videos here yet.
videos.noStudentVideos: Your students haven't uploaded any videos yet.
videos.noVideosForStatuses: No videos are available for the selected review statuses.
videos.uploadFirstDescription: Get started by uploading a video for review.
videos.processingUnavailable: Video is processing or not available.
videos.leaveComment: Leave a comment to share feedback on this video.
videos.reviewerNoComments: Your reviewer hasn't left any comments yet.
videos.confirmDeleteComment: Are you sure you want to delete this comment? This action cannot be undone.
videos.textEnhanceFailed: Failed to enhance text. Please try again.
videos.cannotMarkReviewed: Cannot mark as reviewed: All videos must have at least one review before finalizing.
videos.confirmMarkReviewed: Are you sure you want to mark this video as reviewed? No more comments can be added, edited, or deleted.
videos.markReviewedFailed: Failed to mark video as reviewed

phase4.summary: Review submitted videos, filter by review progress, and open details from one focused view.
phase4.noDescription: No description was added for this video.
phase4.noVideoParts: No video parts are attached yet.
phase4.reviewPlaceholder: Timestamped review comments, editing, and finalization controls will be deepened in the next video-review slice.

groups.noGroupsJoined: You haven't joined any groups yet.
groups.createFirstDescription: Get started by creating a group for your students.
groups.deleteDescription: Permanently delete this group and all its members, invitations, and content.
groups.deleteSummary: This removes the group for every member and cannot be undone.
groups.deleteUnavailable: Only the group owner can delete this group.
groups.deleteConfirm: This action cannot be undone. All group data will be permanently deleted.
groups.expertsDescription: People who can review videos and support this group.
groups.studentsDescription: Students currently assigned to this coaching group.
groups.noExpertsDescription: Experts assigned to this group will appear here.
groups.inviteStudents: Invite students to join this group.
groups.membersLoadFailed: Group members could not be loaded.
groups.membersUnavailableDescription: Your account does not have permission to view students or experts for this group.

inviteDialog.failed: Failed to create invitation. Please try again.

users.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from this group?
users.removed: {{name}} has been removed from the group

phase4.summary: Browse coaching groups, open group pages, and prepare invitations.
phase4.noDescription: No description was added for this group.
phase4.membersPlaceholder: Member lists will connect to the existing student and expert endpoints in the invitation/member-management slice.
phase4.invitePlaceholder: Invitation links and QR codes will use the existing invitation endpoints in the next group-flow slice.
phase4.preferencesSummary: Update the group name, description, and image.

groups.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe who this group is for.

upload.title: Upload Video
upload.dragDrop: Drag and drop videos here or
upload.summary: Prepare the files and context for a student video.
upload.multiPartHint: You can select one video or multiple clips that belong to the same review.
upload.readySummary: Review the details below then click Upload to start.
upload.uploadSuccessDescription: Your video is being processed and will appear in your library shortly.
upload.descriptionPlaceholder: Add context, goals, or notes for the reviewer.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.summary: Track upcoming, past, and cancelled coaching sessions.

empty.upcomingDescription: You don't have any sessions scheduled yet.
empty.pastDescription: Your completed sessions will appear here.

book.selectGroupDescription: Select a group to book a coaching session in.
book.selectExpertDescription: Choose an expert to book a session with.
book.noExpertsDescription: There are no experts with availability in this group yet. Please check back later or try another group.
book.sessionTypeDescription: Choose the type of session you'd like to book.
book.noSessionTypesDescription: The expert hasn't set up any session types yet. Please check back later or contact your coach.
book.selectSlotDescription: Pick a date and time that works for you. All times are in your local timezone.
book.noTimesDescription: This expert doesn't have any open slots right now. Try a different session type or check back later.
book.selectDate: Select a date to see available times
book.bookedDescription: Your coaching session has been successfully scheduled.
book.confirmDescription: Review your session details and confirm your booking.
book.notesPlaceholder: Anything you'd like to share with the expert...
book.slotTaken: That slot was just taken. Please choose another.
book.failed: Failed to book session. Please try again.

cancel.title: Cancel Session
cancel.description: This will cancel the session with {{otherParty}} on {{scheduledAt}}.
cancel.descriptionText: This will cancel the session with {{otherParty}} on {{scheduledAt}}.
cancel.placeholder: Let them know why you are cancelling...
cancel.tooLate: Cancellations must be made at least 1 hour before the session.

availability.title: Manage Availability
availability.noGroupsDescription: You are not a member of any group. Create or join a group to start managing your availability.
availability.noSessionTypesDescription: Add a session type so students can book with you.
availability.noAvailabilityDescription: Add availability blocks to start accepting bookings.
availability.noBlockedDatesDescription: Block specific dates or times when you're unavailable.
availability.durationInvalid: Enter a duration greater than zero.

call.waiting: Waiting for the other participant to join...

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.summary: Keep your profile, local time, language, and notification settings up to date.
preferences.personalSummary: Update the details used across your dashboard and coaching sessions.
preferences.emailSummary: Choose which Zeta activity should reach your inbox.

email.allDescription: Turn off all account notification emails while keeping your category choices for later.
email.newVideos: New videos uploaded to groups you own

avatar.requirement: Required. Use a square JPG or PNG. Large images are compressed automatically.
avatar.optionalRequirement: Optional. Use a square JPG or PNG. Large images are compressed automatically.
